fields.label: Rule Name
fields.description: Unique name. E.g. Sales Invoice Approval

fields.label: DocType
fields.description: Which DocType to watch. E.g. Sales Invoice, Purchase Order, Delivery Note

fields.label: Trigger Event
fields.description:
before_submit — BLOCKS submission until approved via WhatsApp (recommended).
on_save — sends message on save, for Frappe Workflow pattern.
on_submit — notification only, document is already submitted.
on_update_after_submit — fires on save of a submitted document.

fields.label: Condition (optional)
fields.description:
Python expression against `doc`. Leave blank to always trigger.
Examples:
  doc.grand_total > 100000
  doc.customer == 'ABC Corp'
  doc.workflow_state == 'Pending Approval'

fields.label: Message Title
fields.description: Heading at the top of the WhatsApp message.

fields.label: Fields to Display
fields.description: Fields from the document to show in the message body.

fields.label: Approver Source
fields.options:
Fixed Number
Field on Document
Role
fields.description:
Fixed Number — static phone on this rule.
Field on Document — reads a phone field from the document.
Role — finds the first active User with that Role.

fields.label: Approver Phone
fields.description: Digits only with country code. E.g. 919876543210

fields.label: Phone Field on Document
fields.description: Fieldname on the DocType that holds the approver phone.

fields.label: Approver Role
fields.description: First active User with this Role and a mobile_no will receive the message.
